parameters.name: first_name
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const q = $('Query Webhook').item.json.body.query || ''; const stop = new Set(['find','search','look','for','me','records','with','name','a','an','the','born','in','on','and','show','get','all','where']); const tokens = q.toLowerCase().split(/[^a-z]+/).filter(t => t.length > 1 && !stop.has(t)); return tokens[0] ? tokens[0].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + tokens[0].slice(1) : ''; })() }}

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const q = $('Query Webhook').item.json.body.query || ''; const stop = new Set(['find','search','look','for','me','records','with','name','a','an','the','born','in','on','and','show','get','all','where']); const tokens = q.toLowerCase().split(/[^a-z]+/).filter(t => t.length > 1 && !stop.has(t)); return tokens[1] ? tokens[1].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + tokens[1].slice(1) : ''; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{json: {status: 'authenticating', message: 'Logging into TMLink. Please retry your search in 30 seconds.'}}];
